title: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou to Akuyaku Reisoku ga, Deatte Koi ni Ochita Nara: Nanashi no Seirei to Keiyakushite Oidasareta Reijou wa, Kyou mo Reisoku to Kisoiatteiru Youdesu
titleEnglish: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleNative: 悪役令嬢と悪役令息が、出逢って恋に落ちたなら　～名無しの精霊と契約して追い出された令嬢は、今日も令息と競い合っているようです～
synonyms: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
악역 영애와 악역 영식이 만나서 사랑에 빠지면
synopsis: Contracted with a no-name spirit, Brigitte Meidell is a disappointment to her noble family and the mockery of her peers at the Otoleanna Academy of Magic—except for one. Yuri Aurealis is intelligent, handsome…and oh so arrogant. He’s made enemies of the same people as Brigitte, meaning the two should get along just fine. However, his boorishness accidentally sparks a rivalry between them. It’s a competition that has the potential to bring the two closer than they ever thought…! (Source: Yen Press)

titleEnglish: The Hero and the Sage, Reincarnated and Engaged
titleNative: 英雄と賢者の転生婚～かつての好敵手と婚約して最強夫婦になりました～
synonyms: The Reincarnated Marriage of a Hero and Sage
The Reincarnated Marriage of a Hero and Sage: After Becoming Engaged to a Former Rival, We Became the Strongest Couple
synopsis: With their nations in conflict, the Hero Reid and the Sage Elria had long been on opposing sides of the battlefield. However, it would all come to a much too sudden end with the Sage's passing. Single-handedly breaking through the enemy ranks to see Elria one last time, Reid meets his own heroic demise... But then, he opens his eyes as a newborn a thousand years later, getting another chance at life…and love?! (Source: Manga UP! Global)

นักปราชญ์วีรชน ฟื้นคืนชีพชีวิตนี้ขอชำระแค้น
Back From Hell - Le Sage Persécuté se Réincarne pour se Venger
synopsis: The Sage Dwight along with the Hero defeated the Demon Lord who plunged the world into darkness. However, they were falsely accused of becoming the next Demon Lords because of their power, and were thrown to the Death Valley to die… Although his flesh had rotten away, he lived on as a skeleton because of his grudge against the world. Dwight has vowed to turn against that broken world, and with a power that surpasses even the former Demon King, and by leading countless Skeletons he's going to start an all out war…! (Source: Comikey)

title: S-Kyuu Boukensha ga Ayumu Michi: Tsuihou Sareta Shounen wa Shin no Nouryoku 'Buki Master' de Sekai Saikyou ni Itaru
titleRomaji: S-Kyuu Boukensha ga Ayumu Michi: Tsuihou Sareta Shounen wa Shin no Nouryoku 'Buki Master' de Sekai Saikyou ni Itaru
titleNative: Ｓ級冒険者が歩む道　～追放された少年は真の能力『武器マスター』で世界最強に至る～
synopsis: Haise is a young boy who has been gifted with an unknown ability. He becomes an adventurer together with his childhood friend Sasha, but is kicked out of the team for being unable to use his ability and being a hindrance. Furthermore, while continuing his solo adventure, he is caught in a trap and falls into dire straits. Just as he is on the brink of death, Haise's ability "Weapon Master" awakens! It is a power that shakes the laws of the world, summoning weapons from another world!? An unrivaled fantasy set in another world that begins with adversity! (Source: SB Creative, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: S-Kyuu Boukensha ga Ayumu Michi - Tsuihou Sareta Shounen wa Shin no Nouryoku "Buki Master" de Sekai Saikyou ni Itaru

synonyms: 想與陰暗的她一起做的事
synopsis: Starting his second year of high school, Ren Tabata was determined to get over his loner past and make some new friends. The first person he approached was the girl next to him, Touko Sasaki, who seemed gloomy and a little intimidating at first, but he couldn't seem to take his eyes off her. A romantic comedy between two shy but cute people who don't want to be alone anymore! (Source: DoraDora Sharp#, translated)

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)

title: Shut up, Evil Dragon, I Don't Want to Raise A Child with You Anymore
titleEnglish: Shut up, Evil Dragon, I Don't Want to Raise A Child with You Anymore
titleRomaji: Bizui Elong Wo Bu Xiang Zai Gen Ni Dai Haizi Le
titleNative: 闭嘴恶龙我不想再跟你带孩子了
synopsis: The dragon slayer Leon was defeated and captured by the Silver Dragon Queen. With his life on the line, he tried to use forbidden magic to curse the dragon queen, but the curse had unexpected side effects, and the queen lost control as they had a one-night stand. He thought that the shame she would carry for the rest of her life would be enough to fulfill his life's purpose as a dragon slayer. But two years later, when Leon opened his eyes, he found a young dragon girl with a tail sleeping next to him…

title: Konyakusha ni Wasurerareta Watashi Ringoku no Koutaishi Denka to Gisou Konyaku suru Koto ni Narimashita (※Tadashi, Denka no Honmei wa Watashi Mitai desu!?)
titleRomaji: Konyakusha ni Wasurerareta Watashi Ringoku no Koutaishi Denka to Gisou Konyaku suru Koto ni Narimashita (※Tadashi, Denka no Honmei wa Watashi Mitai desu!?)
titleNative: 婚約者に忘れられた私、隣国の皇太子殿下と偽装婚約することになりました(※ただし、殿下の本命は私みたいです!?
synopsis: Leafe, the eldest daughter of a duke, is the reincarnation of the dark magician Laurie. In her previous life, she was feared as an evil woman of unparalleled wickedness and lived a solitary life. In this life, she has avoided loneliness and has successfully lived a smooth life surrounded by her family and fiancé. However, her younger sister Aria stole her fiancé and kicked her out of the house, returning her to a life of solitude. In order to attend Aria's engagement party and fight back, Leafe asks Oliver, the crown prince of a neighboring country, to be her partner. She thought this would be a one-off, but for some reason Oliver has asked her to marry him!? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Fushi no Kami: Rebuilding Civilization Starts With a Village
titleRomaji: Fushi no Kami: Henkyou kara Hajimeru Bunmei Saiseiki
titleEnglish: Fushi no Kami: Rebuilding Civilization Starts With a Village
titleNative: フシノカミ～辺境から始める文明再生記～
synopsis: When the civilizations of yesteryear fade from memory and become fanciful fantasy, the only evidence of their existence...are books. Ash, a young boy living in a remote farming village, holds a secret—he possesses memories of a distant and more bountiful past life. Days of toiling in the fields have given rise to a burning desire: to bring more enjoyment to the everyday doldrum of his dreary present day! And while books may be the answer, Ash...can’t actually read! But where there is a will, there is a way. Join Ash as he battles illiteracy and sets his sights on a better life! (Source: J-Novel Club)

titleRomaji: Zeitaku Zanmai shitai no desu! Binbou Ryouchi no Mahou Kaikaku Akuyaku Reijou Nante Narimasen!
titleNative: 贅沢三昧したいのです! ～貧乏領地の魔法改革 悪役令嬢なんてなりません!～
synonyms: Zeitaku Zanmai shitai no desu! Tensei shita noni Binbou Nante Yurusenai node, Mahou de Ryouchi Kaikaku
贅沢三昧したいのです! 転生したのに貧乏なんて許せないので、魔法で領地改革
synopsis: On her fifth birthday, Sallestia remembers her previous life and her life of poverty with the shock of a blow to the head... And now, to her surprise, she understands that she has been reincarnated as the villainesss in an Otome game! "I was poor in my previous life, and now that I've been reincarnated as a nobleman's daughter, I'm going to enjoy all the luxuries!" But... The servants and villagers of the estate are all skinny and on the verge of starvation...? I can't allow myself to be poor in my reincarnation! I'll use magic to reform the estate and make the villagers and myself rich!
chapterSourceTitle: Zeitaku Zanmai Shitai no desu! ~Tensei Shita no ni Binbou nante Yurusenai no de, Mahou de Ryouchi Kaikaku~

title: Kateikyoshi no Kishi Naito desu.
titleNative: 家庭教師の岸騎士です。
synopsis: It's an emergency! Tooru Takasugi, 17 years old and an active yankee, is about to fail out of school! At the end of her tether, his mother enlists the help of charming tutor Naito Kishi. Can this knight in carefully pressed clothes save Tooru from failing? And why does Tooru get butterflies in his stomach every time he's near Kishi? Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Namaiki Asahi-chan wo Wakarasetai
titleNative: ナマイキ旭ちゃんをわからせたい
synonyms: I Wanna Set This Cocky Asahi-chan Straight
synopsis: Ryou is in his last year of high school, and he's enjoying his otaku life to the fullest — except for a certain girl who's really getting on his nerves. She goes to his school and she's none other than his cocky two-year younger childhood-friend, Asahi-chan! Though she's suppose to be his kouhai, she's always teasing him whenever she gets the chance! On the other hand, if she gets teased back, she starts acting like "you can't say anything mean to me because I'm a cute girl." Furthermore, she's "afraid of people with practically no friends who can't be honest with their feelings." Someday, somehow, someone has to set this cocky Asahi-chan straight! (Source: Pocket Magazine, translated)

title: Vigilante 2
titleNative: 비질란테 2부
synopsis: After graduating from the Korean National Police University and becoming a detective, Ji-Yong is assigned to investigate a suspicious report and comes face-to-face with a nationwide jeonse scam. As he confronts criminals who slip through the cracks of the legal system without proper punishment, Ji-Yong begins to question the rules of vigilante justice he once set for himself. While pursuing the scam’s ringleaders, the four vigilantes receive a threat from someone who knows their true identities and begin to sense the looming presence of a far greater evil. (Source: WEBTOON)
